reason: Browser use feature successfully executed - agent opened a browser, navigated to example.com, retrieved page title "Example Domain", and closed the browser.
steps: Step 1 - Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with Gamut app displaying the agent list in the sidebar.
Step 2 - Found "QA-20260724-021031-mky6" agent in sidebar — Agent was visible in the "Your Agents" section with "idle" status, clicked successfully.
Step 3 - Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." — Message was entered in the text input box and send button was enabled.
Step 4 - Clicked send button — Message was sent successfully, agent status changed to "working", new session "Browser Page Title Lookup" was created.
Step 5a - Agent executed ToolSearch — Tool search was performed to find browser tools.
Step 5b - Agent executed Open Browser tool — Browser was opened and navigated to https://example.com with success indicator shown.
Step 5c - Agent executed Browser MCP: Browser Get State tool — Page state was retrieved successfully.
Step 5d - Agent returned first response — "The page title is "Example Domain"." Response clearly mentions "Example Domain".
Step 5e - Agent executed Close Browser tool — Browser session was closed successfully with checkmark indicator.
Step 5f - Agent provided final summary — "The page at https://example.com loaded successfully, and its title is "Example Domain". Browser closed." Worked for 17s.
Step 6 - Verified final state — Agent returned to "idle" status, all tools completed successfully with green checkmarks, response clearly mentions "Example Domain" as required.
